name: Nut-Free Cranberry Balls
intro: Dried cranberry powder is a concentrated form of cranberry; it’s an awesome alternative to fresh berries because the wholesome cranberries become even better for you! These balls are also boosted with pumpkin seeds, a superb source for zinc that maintains our body’s metabolism.
method: Mix the pumpkin and sunflower seeds in a food processor until they are finely ground. Add in the remaining ingredients and process until you can make balls out of the mixture. Try rolling the balls in cranberry powder.
